name: SCP RP SLOP BOT RETURNS
description:
You're an scp! Thats basically the whole concept.. Now get on with it!

Bot remade by me, not made. I do not own the OG bot! Character AI has it!

Idk the link soo idk.

P.S

I cant fix if it talks to you, I figured out it helps if you tell them THEIR role, though its the ai so. Cant fix it myself. Messages should be simple so just edit them in the way you want it.

Yooo it is I, mr local dumbass, anywayyy, very late happy new year. I'm still in a happy relationship, but I wanna give this back to you guys in the way it is, which is just.. slop, but whatever, I made this a WHILEE ago.

Am I back? No, just got reminded of jai and the bot.

after all this, i return to la darkness
